name: Cute Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sample the whisky to check quality. Select a large mixing bowl.
2. Check the whisky again as it must be just right. To ensure the whisky is of top quality, pour 1 large glass and drink fast. Repeat.
3. With an electric mixer, beat 1 cup of butter in a large fluffy bowl.
4. Add 1 teaspoon sugar and beat again. Meanwhile, check the whisky is still top quality by crying another toast. Repeat.
5. Add 2 large eggs, 4 cups mixed dried fruit, and beat until high.
6. Sample whisky again, checking for smoothness. Sift 3 cups of baking powder (or anything) into the mixture.
7. Add 6 drops of lemon juice. Fold in chopped nuts.
8. Stir in 1 teaspoon baking soda and 1 teaspoon sugar.
9. Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius. Grease a cake pan.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for the specified time.
